  2. Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

How we collect, use, and protect information on MalaysianOpenTennis.com.

MalaysianOpenTennis.com respects your privacy and is committed to protecting any personal information you may provide when using our website.

This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect information when you visit MalaysianOpenTennis.com. This website is an independent tennis and sports information website focused on Malaysian tennis events, tennis rules, rankings, player resources, tournament history, and related sports education.

By using this website, you agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy.

1. Who We Are

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is an independent tennis and sports information website.

Our website address is: https://www.malaysianopentennis.com

For privacy-related questions, you may contact us at:
Email: info@malaysianopentennis.com

2. Information We May Collect

We may collect limited information from visitors in the following ways.

Information You Provide Voluntarily

You may provide information when you:

  • Contact us through a contact form
  • Send us an email
  • Submit tournament updates, corrections, or feedback
  • Request changes to player, event, or venue information

This information may include:

  • Name
  • Email address
  • Organisation or club name, if provided
  • Message content
  • Any information you choose to include in your submission

Information Collected Automatically

When you visit our website, certain technical information may be collected automatically, such as:

  • IP address
  • Browser type
  • Device type
  • Pages visited
  • Referring website
  • Approximate location based on browser or analytics data
  • Date and time of visit
  • Website usage behaviour

This information is generally used for website analytics, security, performance monitoring, and content improvement.

3. How We Use Information

We may use collected information to:

  • Respond to enquiries
  • Review correction requests
  • Process tournament, event, player, or venue update submissions
  • Improve website content and user experience
  • Monitor website performance
  • Detect spam, abuse, or security issues
  • Maintain editorial accuracy
  • Understand which pages are useful to readers
  • Comply with applicable legal obligations

We do not sell your personal information.

4. Cookies and Tracking Technologies

MalaysianOpenTennis.com may use cookies or similar technologies to improve website functionality, measure traffic, and understand how visitors use the website.

Cookies may be used for:

  • Website analytics
  • Performance monitoring
  • Security protection
  • Remembering basic user preferences
  • Improving site navigation

You can disable cookies through your browser settings. However, some website features may not function properly if cookies are disabled.

5. Analytics Tools

We may use analytics tools, such as Google Analytics or similar services, to understand website traffic and user behaviour.

These tools may collect information such as:

  • Pages viewed
  • Time spent on the website
  • Device type
  • Browser type
  • Referring websites
  • General geographic location

Analytics information is used to improve our content and website performance.

If Google Analytics is used, Google may process data according to its own privacy policies and settings.

6. Contact Forms and Email Submissions

If you contact us through a form or email, we may use the information you provide to respond to your message.

Examples include:

  • General questions
  • Editorial corrections
  • Player profile updates
  • Tournament submissions
  • Venue information updates
  • Partnership or media enquiries

We may retain correspondence for record-keeping, editorial verification, or follow-up purposes.

7. Public Submissions

If you submit information about a tournament, player, club, venue, or event, we may review and publish relevant parts of that information on the website.

We will avoid publishing unnecessary personal details, especially for junior players. Information about minors should only be submitted by an appropriate parent, guardian, coach, organiser, or authorised representative.

8. How We Protect Information

We take reasonable steps to protect personal information from unauthorised access, misuse, loss, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

These steps may include:

  • Secure website hosting
  • HTTPS encryption
  • Limited access to submitted information
  • Spam protection
  • Basic website security monitoring

However, no method of internet transmission or electronic storage is completely secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.

9. Sharing of Information

We do not sell, rent, or trade personal information.

We may share information only when necessary, including:

  • With service providers who help operate the website
  • With analytics, hosting, or security providers
  • When required by law or legal process
  • To protect the rights, safety, or security of the website, users, or others
  • With your permission

Service providers may include website hosting, analytics, email, spam protection, and security tools.

10. Third-Party Links

MalaysianOpenTennis.com may link to external websites, including tennis organisations, tournament organisers, sports bodies, clubs, academies, and other reference sources.

We are not responsible for the privacy practices, content, or policies of third-party websites. You should review their privacy policies before providing any personal information.

11. Affiliate Links and Commercial Content

MalaysianOpenTennis.com may include affiliate links, sponsorships, or commercial content in the future.

If affiliate links are used, we may earn a commission when users click a link or make a purchase or sign-up through that link. This will not affect the price you pay.

Any affiliate or sponsored content will be disclosed where appropriate.

12. Responsible Gambling and Age-Sensitive Content

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is currently a sports-first editorial website. If future content includes sports betting education, sportsbook comparisons, or related commercial content, such content will be intended only for adults who are legally permitted to access it in their jurisdiction.

We support responsible gambling and encourage users to understand local laws, age restrictions, and personal risk before engaging with any betting-related products or services.

13. Data Retention

We retain personal information only as long as reasonably necessary for the purposes described in this Privacy Policy.

For example:

  • Contact messages may be retained for communication records.
  • Editorial submissions may be retained for verification.
  • Analytics data may be retained according to the settings of the analytics provider.
  • Legal or compliance-related records may be retained as required.

14. Your Rights

Depending on applicable law, you may have the right to:

  • Request access to personal information we hold about you
  • Request correction of inaccurate information
  • Request deletion of certain information
  • Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent
  • Ask questions about how your information is used

To make a request, contact us at:
Email: info@malaysianopentennis.com

We may need to verify your identity before processing certain requests.

15. Children's Privacy

Our website is intended for general sports information and is not designed to collect personal information from children.

Because tennis content may include junior sports topics, we take care to avoid publishing unnecessary personal information about minors.

If you believe a child's personal information has been submitted or published without appropriate permission, please contact us so we can review the matter.

16. International Visitors

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is focused primarily on Malaysia, but users from other countries may access the website.

If you access the website from outside Malaysia, you understand that your information may be processed in countries where our service providers operate.

17. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.

When changes are made, we will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Continued use of the website after changes are posted means you accept the updated Privacy Policy.

18. Contact Us

For questions about this Privacy Policy or how your information is handled, please contact:

MalaysianOpenTennis.com
Email: info@malaysianopentennis.com

Last updated: 19 June 2026

Malaysian Open Tennis

Tournaments, records and resources for Malaysian tennis — independent and editorial-first.

Site

AboutEditorial PolicyContactPrivacy PolicyTerms

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is an independent tennis and sports information website. We provide educational guides, tournament resources, and editorial content for Malaysian tennis fans and players.
© 2026 malaysianopentennis.com. All rights reserved. Independent site — not affiliated with the ATP, WTA, BWF, PSA, LTAM, or any tournament organiser.
